# MuleSoft Amazon Secrets Manager Properties Provider

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.1) of Amazon Secrets Manager Properties Provider documentation.
> See [Amazon Secrets Manager Properties Provider llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-secrets-manager-properties-provider-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Amazon Secrets Manager Properties Provider documentation in one file.
